generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values our nation's security and independence, I've been concerned about how over-reliance on foreign tech is putting us at risk. Did you know that even our allies could use this dependence to compromise our critical infrastructure? Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation—it's about ensuring we have the resilience to protect our citizens when it matters most. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
